7: Furthermore, the effectiveness of the Reflection pattern is significantly enhanced
8: when the LLM keeps a memory of the conversation (see Chapter 8). This
9: conversational history provides crucial context for the evaluation phase, allowing the
10: agent to assess its output not just in isolation, but against the backdrop of previous
11: interactions, user feedback, and evolving goals. It enables the agent to learn from
12: past critiques and avoid repeating errors. Without memory, each reflection is a
13: self-contained event; with memory, reflection becomes a cumulative process where
14: each cycle builds upon the last, leading to more intelligent and context-aware
17: The Reflection pattern is valuable in scenarios where output quality, accuracy, or
18: adherence to complex constraints is critical:
20: Refining generated text, stories, poems, or marketing copy.
22: Use Case: An agent writing a blog post.
24: Reflection: Generate a draft, critique it for flow, tone, and clarity, then rewrite
25: based on the critique. Repeat until the post meets quality standards.
27: Benefit: Produces more polished and effective content.
29: Writing code, identifying errors, and fixing them.
31: Use Case: An agent writing a Python function.
33: Reflection: Write initial code, run tests or static analysis, identify errors or
34: inefficiencies, then modify the code based on the findings.
36: Benefit: Generates more robust and functional code.
38: Evaluating intermediate steps or proposed solutions in multi-step reasoning tasks.
40: Use Case: An agent solving a logic puzzle.
